offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual expense report generation causes delays in reimbursement. We streamline expense report generation instead of manual entry of expenses into QuickBooks.
problem: Manual expense report generation is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Community forums where freelancers share tools
try_it: Let users try receipt scanning and expense categorization on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
